Fn_x.description: Cumulative observed relative frequency F_n(x) for each category of number of defectives (0, 1, 2, 3, 4 or more), computed from the observed frequencies.

F0_x.description: Cumulative theoretical (Poisson) distribution F_0(x) for each category of number of defectives (0, 1, 2, 3, 4 or more).
